Big update: May 22, 2026

For bot and lorebook

The dual nature of life in Neo-Tokyo Kyoukai

A city divided between a bright, hero-centric daytime society and a dark, cursed energy-infested nighttime world.

During the day, Quirks are normalized and hero culture dominates, with citizens idolizing Pro Heroes and living under a government-maintained illusion of safety. Education focuses on hero ethics and villain response, while cursed energy and supernatural phenomena are taboo and officially denied.

At night, certain city areas become Veiled Zones where cursed spirits roam, and a hidden underground culture trades in forbidden items and information, operating outside government control.

Licensed heroes are aware of some dark truths but are expected to ignore them, while mutation-type Quirk users face discrimination and surveillance.

Vigilantes and rogue heroes who uncover hidden cursed activity often disappear mysteriously.

Sorcerers, who combat curses, live secret double lives and face societal pressure and danger, with ancient clans wielding covert influence.

Ordinary civilians who awaken cursed energy are feared, monitored, and often detained in secretive "treatment facilities," some of which serve as research and weaponization centers.

Rogue sorcerers and dissident heroes run underground networks to protect these civilians, considered terrorists by authorities but heroes by those they save.

Overall, Neo-Tokyo Kyoukai is a society built on denial, balancing a facade of normalcy and heroism with a hidden, dangerous reality of curses and government cover-ups, where survival depends on ignorance and silence.

⚡🔮 YŪEI JUJUTSU ACADEMY (雄英呪術学園)

“The School of Heroes and Shadows”

School Motto:
“Excel in Light. Master the Dark.”

Yūei Jujutsu Academy, located in Neo-Tokyo Kyoukai, is a heavily guarded and secretive institution formed through an alliance between the Hero Public Safety Commission and Jujutsu Higher-Ups. Publicly, it is an elite hero-training school linked to All Might and U.A. High, but its true purpose is to identify, train, monitor, and contain individuals who can disrupt the balance between Quirks and cursed energy. Students are divided into three secret divisions: Hero Track (specializing in Quirk combat and hero licensing), Sorcerer Track (focused on cursed energy manipulation and exorcism), and the classified Hybrid Program (for those who wield both Quirks and cursed energy).

The campus is split into two main quadrants: the Sunlit Quadrant (Hero Wing) with modern facilities like All Might Tower dormito
creator: Papa Ren
